brief_summary: Two-column tier diagram comparing Gaming HE (flagship $200+, mid $120–$200, entry $80–$120) against Enthusiast HE (boutique custom $200+, mid prebuilt $130–$200). A dashed coral arrow bridges the Gaming mid tier to the Enthusiast mid-prebuilt tier with the label 'price curve converging'. The mid tiers on both sides are coral-highlighted, making the convergence argument visual.
